_comment: Configuration for Room99 Feed Duplicator. Edit duplicateRules to add/remove keyword variants. Save = next cron tick picks up changes.
_comment_rules: Reguly duplikacji. Skrypt znajduje produkty gdzie title pasuje do matchInTitle, generuje duplikat z searchInTitle -> replaceWith. Dodaj/usun reguly bez restartu - nastepny cron tick je zauwazy.

duplicateRules.notes: Test edit via panel — auto-fallback should work even with limited PAT scope. Timestamp: 2026-05-14T01:24:42Z
Fixed: searchInTitle was "GARDEN LINE", now correctly removes "ZASŁONA NA TARAS" before inserting "Zasłona wodoodporna"

_comment_audit: Reguly poprawek z audytora: kazdy duplikat MUSI miec gtin/mpn puste oraz identifier_exists=no, zeby GMC nie zglosil 'Duplicate product'.
_comment_custom_labels: 2026-05-14: usunieto custom_label_0='TITLE_TEST' override. Duplikaty zachowuja parent custom_label_0 (category np 'zaslony gotowe > zaslony 140x300') i custom_label_1 (collection 'garden line'). generate-feed.js automatycznie dodaje custom_label_8 = rule.dupSuffix (t1..t7) per regule. Tak dziala dedykowana kampania testowa Marcin'a [PLA] Zaslony Garden Line Testy Tytulow (ID 23840838231): 5 ad-groupow scoped na custom_label_8 = 't1'..'t5'.

imageRules.notes: Image variant img_g — promotes additional_image_link[6] as main
